## How tested

- [ ] `make test-unit`
- [ ] `make test-integration`

- [ ] `make test-security` (if touched auth, audit, approval, web admin)

## Impact

- [ ] Breaking change to API or config (document migration in `docs/operations.md`)
- [ ] New secret / env var required (update `.env.example` and `docs/operations.md`)
- [ ] Migration added (`alembic/versions/`)
- [ ] None of the above
